Interface IMosaicDatasetOperation6

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to additional moasaic dataset operations.

[Guid("F0073A58-7F90-40DD-ADFE-DA7C50AE36A7")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IMosaicDatasetOperation6 : IMosaicDatasetOperation5, IMosaicDatasetOperation4, IMosaicDatasetOperation3, IMosaicDatasetOperation2, IMosaicDatasetOperation
